turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I just wanted to know what are your clinic's working hours? Like, do you work on Sundays?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good morning! Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic is open Monday through Saturday from 8 AM to 8 PM. On Sundays we have limited hours — 9 AM to 1 PM for emergency and selected OPD services only.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: And what about parking? Is there parking available there?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we have a dedicated parking area that can accommodate about 50 vehicles. Two-wheeler parking is free, and four-wheeler parking is charged at ₹20 per hour.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Alright. And where exactly are you located? I know it's in Pune but I'm not sure of the area.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We're located at Plot 14, Baner Road, near the Baner Gymkhana, Pune 411045. You can also find us on Google Maps by searching Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic Baner.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Anytime! Hope to see you soon.
